{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194801CDF8D189EA1AC3679067"}"},"total":4033},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580741360123527960","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"前期写的一般，出新手十站后越来越好了，逻辑正常，故事讲的很好，属于是低开高走了。节奏可以，没有太慢，而且主角也很无敌，非常满意。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765030465,"group_id":"7486697608677690392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"午枕睡酣窗寂寂，清风来去自翻书。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6ssXJT92pJ/NHgSnIWvh/l1c0U/CRudMDPwU/oQ3NfP","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"1552939637815131","user_name":"沉睡者芬里尔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1552939637815131","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486697608677690392","book_info":{"abstract":"【列车求生+孤狼+永远领先+升华进化+不圣母+不龟男】
睁开眼的那一刻，叶七言来到了列车求生的世界。
所有人都要为了生存进入一个个的站台下车探索。
幸运儿得到宝藏，倒霉蛋失去生命。
机遇和危险并存。
收集物资，强化列车，建立独属于自己的列车世界。
而他，叶七言，拥有着与生俱来独一无二的升华天赋，无论是什么存在在他手中都能得到极尽的升华！
【劣质小刀→锋锐附魔匕首→永恒切割者】
【白森果树→祝福果树→维纳斯的黄金果树】
【蜂巢→大针蜂巢→纳米未来蜂巢】
在其他人还在为了一块面包而努力的时候，叶七言凭借着升华的能力不断变强，将所有人甩在身后。
“那么，列车也是可以升华？”
于是，当列车求生尚未抵达第一站，在所有人之前开始领先！
【升华成功！打破记录！开启命运的岔路口模块！】
【亲爱的列车长，您可以选择接下来的站点了！】

200810668131134","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错吧。性格有点自私这方面确实有点小毒，能接受就能看。前期略过去的话后面确实还是蛮好看的。女性相处感觉没啥问题，就是人口比例怪怪的，主角身边好像没几个男的。
整体来说在同类型里还不错（也可能是同类型我看过的，要么更毒，要么太短，要么断更了）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767235157,"group_id":"7486697608677690392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"除了后宫文其他什么都喜欢看一点（无论哪种性别的后宫都不喜欢）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwj0/XQREiYT1HfvL6e5rIsjH4GHf/BuV3bCUvYGYueB","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/36c781197f41457aa157b93599ce72fb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787217&x-signature=RsTtY3%2BHQvHNL5t8SnrqLevAnbI%3D","user_id":"2722860623730919","user_name":"祁泠Violet"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2722860623730919","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1777017588,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486697608677690392","book_info":{"abstract":"【列车求生+孤狼+永远领先+升华进化+不圣母+不龟男】

607095162508198681","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材一般，但是内容很新颖，独特的设定“牌序”算是比较吸引人的一个点，写的还是非常好的，毒点不多，现在这种快节奏的阅读中可能很多人不喜欢，看前期的一些内容就放弃，但是看的去还是很推荐的，虽然确实没有女主但是对赵琳的关注太多了，后期沙娅对男主的感情也有点奇怪，就是一个强大的人被一个很弱的人救了后面感觉对他有喜欢的那种情感就不太可能，总体来说还是非常推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771167894,"group_id":"7486697608677690392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"留住心中小小的自己。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9mNbLKABjUJkZmErGG7YizAYG/f5V83Tgaoqke9996g","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/981feb34248747da9c7c96006997d728~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792973&x-signature=83EpyHDqkYxDY1epiT1t8IRtuXE%3D","user_id":"1711262003375470","user_name":"做了一场夣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1711262003375470","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486697608677690392","book_info":{"abstract":"【列车求生+孤狼+永远领先+升华进化+不圣母+不龟男】
